briefdescription.para: Not to configure Dst DMA at this address in AES.
Sources to be selected to configure secure stream switch.
This function is not applicable for versal_2vp.

parameterdescription.para: To set or clear the bit.

briefdescription.para: This function is not applicable for versal_2vp.
This file contains versal_2vp specific code for xilsecure server.
